subcodes.first_line: O loving friends of Abdu'l-Baha! Bushruyih was the land of that divine lion, that exalted champion, the Báb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء بشرویه بیشه آن غضنفر الهی هزبر سامی بود حضرت باب
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
